_doc: Patterns for Rails stack — RSpec output, Devise login, ActiveRecord callbacks, FactoryBot, ActiveJob/Sidekiq, system tests. Detection: presence of `config/application.rb`. Same plug-in rules as other recipe files. Public PR welcome.

patterns.template:
# Devise login via /users/sign_in.
        page.goto(BASE + '/users/sign_in')
        page.fill('input[name="user[email]"]', LOGIN)
        page.fill('input[name="user[password]"]', PASSWORD)
        page.click('input[type=submit]')
        page.wait_for_load_state('networkidle', timeout=15000)

# FactoryBot create + assert record persisted.
        import subprocess
        rb_script = '''
            require_relative "config/environment"
            require "factory_bot_rails"
            instance = FactoryBot.create(:{factory})
            puts "AUDIT_FACTORY_ID=#{{instance.id}}"
            puts "AUDIT_VALID=#{{instance.valid?}}"
        '''
        proc = subprocess.run(['bin/rails', 'runner', rb_script],
                              capture_output=True, text=True, timeout=60)
        EVIDENCE['checks']['factory_{factory}'] = {{
            'returncode': proc.returncode,
            'stdout_tail': (proc.stdout or '')[-300:],
            'pass': proc.returncode == 0 and 'AUDIT_VALID=true' in (proc.stdout or '')
        }}

# Assert before_action filter fires before controller action.
        import subprocess
        rb_script = '''
            require_relative "config/environment"
            ctrl = {controller}.new
            chain = ctrl._process_action_callbacks.map(&:filter)
            puts "AUDIT_FILTER_PRESENT=#{{chain.include?(:{action})}}"
        '''
        proc = subprocess.run(['bin/rails', 'runner', rb_script],
                              capture_output=True, text=True, timeout=30)
        EVIDENCE['checks']['{controller}_{action}_filter'] = {{
            'returncode': proc.returncode,
            'present': 'AUDIT_FILTER_PRESENT=true' in (proc.stdout or ''),
            'pass': 'AUDIT_FILTER_PRESENT=true' in (proc.stdout or '')
        }}

# Assert ActiveJob {job} enqueues + runs (inline adapter).
        import subprocess
        rb_script = '''
            require_relative "config/environment"
            ActiveJob::Base.queue_adapter = :inline
            before = ActiveJob::Base.queue_adapter.enqueued_jobs.size rescue 0
            {job}.perform_later
            after = ActiveJob::Base.queue_adapter.enqueued_jobs.size rescue 0
            puts "AUDIT_JOB_RAN=#{{after - before}}"
        '''
        proc = subprocess.run(['bin/rails', 'runner', rb_script],
                              capture_output=True, text=True, timeout=60)
        EVIDENCE['checks']['{job}_perform'] = {{
            'returncode': proc.returncode,
            'stdout_tail': (proc.stdout or '')[-200:],
            'pass': proc.returncode == 0
        }}

# Assert {model}.errors contains {field} validation error.
        import subprocess
        rb_script = '''
            require_relative "config/environment"
            instance = {model}.new
            instance.valid?
            puts "AUDIT_ERROR_FIELDS=#{{instance.errors.attribute_names.inspect}}"
        '''
        proc = subprocess.run(['bin/rails', 'runner', rb_script],
                              capture_output=True, text=True, timeout=30)
        EVIDENCE['checks']['{model}_validation_{field}'] = {{
            'has_error': ':{field}' in (proc.stdout or ''),
            'stdout_tail': (proc.stdout or '')[-200:],
            'pass': ':{field}' in (proc.stdout or '')
        }}
